title: 卧薪尝胆
meaning: 比喻刻苦自励，发愤图强

scenes.title: 战败受辱
scenes.prompt: A defeated king sleeping on firewood, cartoon style, suffering scene
scenes.narration: 越王勾践战败后，每天睡在柴草上。

scenes.title: 尝苦胆
scenes.prompt: A king tasting bitter gall bladder, cartoon style, determination scene
scenes.narration: 他每天尝苦胆，提醒自己不要忘记耻辱。

scenes.title: 最终复仇
scenes.prompt: A king leading his army to victory, cartoon style, triumphant scene
scenes.narration: 经过多年努力，他终于打败了敌人，报了仇。
